channel.title: Authors on Junhong Shen
channel.description: Recent content in Authors on Junhong Shen

item.title: Junhong Shen
item.description: Junhong is a fourth-year undergraduate student at UCLA. Currently, she works as an undergraduate researcher at VCLA under the supervision of Song-Chun Zhu and Ph.D. candidate Luyao Yuan. #Nelson Bighetti is a professor of artificial intelligence at the Stanford AI Lab.
